audit_items.proof_trace: The multiplier constraints (lines 650–657) are intentionally skipped for s_assetOut, as documented by the code comment at line 645: 'The asset out is also configured but it only requires the min auction size to avoid dust attacks.' The s_assetOut params are only read for .decimals (line 802) when computing assetOut amounts — the multipliers are not used in the normal bid flow. Setting invalid multipliers for s_assetOut requires ASSET_ADMIN_ROLE and represents intentional design, not a security gap.
